title: helictochloa albinervis
intro: Helictochloa albinervis, also known as pale-stemmed bent or alpine brome, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helictochloa albinervis include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and immune system support. Herbal preparations of Helictochloa albinervis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
